prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: 26C-10PCGARDTOOLS-BUN Product Type: GARDEN_TOOL_SET Brand (from catalog): ToolTreaux Existing Title: ToolTreaux 10pc Gardening Handheld Tools Set Gloves Carry Bag and Kneeling Pad Description: Are you an avid gardener or just getting started? This set of 10 gardening tools from ToolTreaux comes with 10 essential tools and supplies used to remove garden debris, as well as to level and grade your garden soil before plants or seeds are planted in your garden, herb garden, flowerpot, plant pot, or succulent planter.

Inside this set, you'll find 10 common gardening tools that every gardener needs to ensure they have a healthy garden: a hoe, rake, shovel, gardening gloves, gloves with claws, pruning shears, a digger, a scoop, and a carry bag. The hoe is perfect for weeding and chopping soil, the rake for leveling and grading, and the shovel for digging and aerating.

Our tool bag is constructed of heavy-duty, durable nylon that will keep your tools organized and ready to use whenever you need them. The bag itself measures 15" x 9" x 11" when open, and has a sturdy zip closure at the top of the bag. Both sides of the bag feature side pockets so you can have easy access to your most commonly used tools and accessories.

To properly clean your garden tools, just rinse them and dry them once done and store them in a dry place to increase longevity. Whether you're an experienced gardener or trying a new hobby, this is a must-have set of essential gardening supplies. Search Terms: gardening hand tools mothers gift gardening kit green thumb home plant lover house landscaping projects weeding patio landscaping accessories rake leaf rake Features: - 10PC GARDENING TOOLS SET - ToolTreaux 10pc garden tools set comes with 10 essential tools and accessories to remove gardening debris, grading and leveling your garden to prepare for planting and planting seeds; Ideal set for growing flowers, herbs, succulents, and more - MULTI-USE GARDEN BUNDLE - Includes common gardening tools designed to help dig, plant, and cultivate your garden as well as other gardening supplies: hoe, rake, shovel, gardening gloves, gloves with claws, pruning shears, digger, scoop and carry bag - STURDY CARRY BAG - Bag is constructed of heavy-duty, durable nylon that will keep your tools organized and ready to use whenever you need them; Measures 15" x 9" x 11" when open, and has a sturdy zip closure at the top of the bag; Both sides of the bag feature side pockets so you can have easy access to your most commonly used tools and accessories - DURABLE CONSTRUCTION - Tools are made of durable wood, steel, and plastic to ensure a long service life; Materials are water-resistant so you can garden rain or shine; Rinse and dry garden cultivator tools once done and store in a dry place to increase longevity - SPECIFICATIONS - Materials: wood, steel, nylon, latex; Colors: black, green; Set size: 10 pieces; Soft-foam wrapped handles; Weather-resistant tools === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: ToolTreaux 10-Piece Gardening Hand Tools Set with Bag

tokens.name: Gardening Hand Tools Set with Bag

anthropic.title_differentiation: Hoe, Rake, Shovel, Gloves, Pruning Shears, Digger, Scoop, Heavy-Duty Nylon Carry Bag, Durable Steel And Wood

openai.title_differentiation: 10 Essential Tools, Heavy Duty Nylon Carry Bag, Gloves And Claw Gloves, Weather Resistant, Soft Foam Handles
